title: Supermemory App Account — Initial Project Kickoff

segments.speaker: Maya
segments.text: For this demo, we need a clean starting point for the Supermemory account application.

segments.speaker: Maya
segments.text: Dev, please initialize an empty Git repository in a new folder named super-memory-app-account-initial-project. Do not add application code yet.

segments.speaker: Maya
segments.text: Before we build, also research the smallest sensible repository structure, secret-handling rules, and initial documentation we should use for a Supermemory-backed account application. Prefer official Git and GitHub guidance.

segments.speaker: Dev
segments.text: Understood. I own the repository bootstrap and the evidence-backed setup recommendation. I will bring both to tomorrow's review.

segments.speaker: Arjun
segments.text: I will prepare the account-flow wireframes separately. That is my task, not Dev's.

segments.speaker: Maya
segments.text: Decision: today we only approve the empty repository and setup brief. Any dependency installation, remote creation, commit, or push requires a separate confirmation.

segments.speaker: Maya
segments.text: At the next meeting, Dev should report the repository location, the recommended initial files, and any security risks involving API keys or local memory data.
